title: Id/UTCDate: six identical trait impls duplicated — macro candidate
description: jmap.rs: Id (lines 51-86) and UTCDate (lines 145-180) each implement Display, AsRef<str>, Deref<Target=str>, PartialEq<str>, PartialEq<&str>, PartialEq<T> for &str in structurally identical form. Any future third newtype (BlobId, State) requires another full copy. Rewrite: a declarative macro impl_string_newtype!(TypeName) that expands all six impls. The macro body is a one-time cost; all three types become one-line invocations.
